Please contact your Arthrex representative if you have questions about the availability of products in your area SpeedBridge™ Knotless Rotator Cuff Repair I US patent information Arthrex manufacturer, authorized representative and importer information (Arthrex elFU) This description of technique is provided as an educational tool and clinical aid to assist properly licensed medical professionals in the usage of specific Arthrex products. As part of this professional usage, the medical professional must use their professional judgment in making any final determinations in product usage and technique. In doing so, the medical professional should rely on their own training and experience, and should conduct a thorough review of pertinent medical literature and the product’s directions for use. Postoperative management is patient-specific and dependent on the treating professional’s assessment. Individual results will vary and not all patients will experience the same postoperative activity level or outcomes. arthrex.com © 2024-01 Arthrex Inc. All rights reserved. LT1-000170-en-US_D
